content: مِن هِنا وَ رايِح هَمَشيِلّكِلاَب بَدري عَلَشانِ الدُنيَا بِتِتحَرّ

transcriptions.arabizi: min hina wa raayih hamashi illkilaeb badri Aalashaen ildunya bititharr

relationships: eng:from now on I will walk the dogs early because it is getting hot
